---
title: "Weekly Lecturer Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    self_contained: true
params:
  lecturer_id: ""
  week_id:     ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 8, fig.height = 4, dpi = 120)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

ANALYTICS_HOME <- Sys.getenv("ANALYTICS_HOME", ".")
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "config.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts",  "utils.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "weekly_lecturer_analysis.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts",  "fetch_data.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts",  "fetch_alerts.R"))

lecturer_id <- params$lecturer_id
week_id     <- params$week_id

stats    <- tryCatch(weekly_lecturer_analysis(lecturer_id, week_id),
                     error = function(e) list(n_sessions=0L, avg_engagement=NA_real_,
                                              avg_concentration=NA_real_, total_students=0L,
                                              session_details=data.frame()))
lecturer <- tryCatch(fetch_lecturer(lecturer_id),   error = function(e) data.frame(full_name="Unknown"))
wp       <- tryCatch(fetch_weekly_period(week_id),  error = function(e) data.frame())
alerts   <- tryCatch(fetch_open_alerts_for_lecturer(lecturer_id), error = function(e) data.frame())
```

<div style="background:#1E3A5F;color:white;padding:14px 18px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:20px">
<strong>Lecturer:</strong> `r if(nrow(lecturer)>0) lecturer$full_name[1] else "Unknown"` &nbsp;·&nbsp;
Week `r if(nrow(wp)>0) paste0(wp$week_number[1],", ",wp$year[1]) else week_id`
`r if(nrow(wp)>0) paste0("(", wp$start_date[1], " – ", wp$end_date[1], ")") else ""`
</div>

## Overview

```{r overview}
kable(data.frame(
  Metric = c("Sessions This Week","Total Students Present","Avg Engagement","Avg Concentration"),
  Value  = c(
    as.character(stats$n_sessions   %||% 0),
    as.character(stats$total_students %||% 0),
    ifelse(is.na(stats$avg_engagement),    "N/A", paste0(round(stats$avg_engagement    * 100), "%")),
    ifelse(is.na(stats$avg_concentration), "N/A", paste0(round(stats$avg_concentration * 100), "%"))
  )
), col.names = c("Metric","Value"), align = c("l","r"))
```

## Engagement per Session

```{r eng-chart}
sd <- stats$session_details
if (!is.null(sd) && nrow(sd) > 0 && "avg_eng" %in% colnames(sd)) {
  sd <- sd %>% mutate(
    label   = paste0(course_code, " – ", format(as.POSIXct(actual_start), "%a %d %b")),
    eng_pct = round(avg_eng * 100, 1)
  )
  ggplot(sd, aes(x = reorder(label, actual_start), y = eng_pct, fill = eng_pct)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.55, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 60, linetype = "dashed", colour = "#E74C3C", alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#E74C3C", high = "#27AE60", limits = c(0, 100)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Avg Engagement %", title = "Engagement per Session") +
    theme_minimal() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1))
} else {
  cat("No session data available for this week.")
}
```

## Student Focus

```{r student-focus}
wp_start <- if (nrow(wp) > 0) as.character(wp$start_date[1]) else format(Sys.Date() - 7)
wp_end   <- if (nrow(wp) > 0) as.character(wp$end_date[1])   else format(Sys.Date())

student_eng <- tryCatch(
  with_connection(function(con) {
    DBI::dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
      "SELECT CONCAT(u.first_name,' ',u.last_name) AS student_name,
              ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN ses.concentration='high'   THEN 85
                             WHEN ses.concentration='medium' THEN 55
                             WHEN ses.concentration='low'    THEN 25
                             ELSE 10 END), 1) AS avg_focus
         FROM student_emotion_snapshots ses
         JOIN users u ON u.id = ses.student_id
         JOIN lecture_sessions ls ON ls.id = ses.session_id
        WHERE ls.lecturer_id = '%s'
          AND ses.captured_at BETWEEN '%s 00:00:00' AND '%s 23:59:59'
        GROUP BY ses.student_id, u.first_name, u.last_name
        ORDER BY avg_focus DESC",
      lecturer_id, wp_start, wp_end))
  }),
  error = function(e) data.frame()
)

if (nrow(student_eng) > 0) {
  n <- min(5, nrow(student_eng))
  kable(rbind(head(student_eng, n), tail(student_eng, n)),
        col.names = c("Student", "Avg Focus %"),
        caption   = paste0("Top ", n, " and Bottom ", n, " students"),
        align     = c("l","r"))
} else {
  cat("No student focus data for this week.")
}
```

## Alerts

```{r alerts-table}
if (!is.null(alerts) && nrow(alerts) > 0) {
  keep <- intersect(c("student_name","alert_type","severity","triggered_at"), colnames(alerts))
  kable(alerts[, keep, drop = FALSE])
} else {
  cat("No open alerts for this week.")
}
```

## Recommendations

```{r tips}
avg_eng <- stats$avg_engagement %||% NA_real_
tips <- character(0)
if (!is.na(avg_eng)) {
  if      (avg_eng < 0.40) tips <- c(tips, "⚡ Engagement critically low — try interactive polls or group work.")
  else if (avg_eng < 0.65) tips <- c(tips, "📈 Moderate engagement — vary pacing with short Q&A breaks.")
  else                     tips <- c(tips, "✅ Great engagement this week — keep it up!")
}
if (!is.null(alerts) && nrow(alerts) > 3)
  tips <- c(tips, "🔔 Multiple alerts — review at-risk students individually.")
if (length(tips) == 0) tips <- "No specific recommendations this week."
cat(paste(tips, collapse = "\n\n"))
```

---
*EduVision Analytics · `r format(Sys.time(), "%d %B %Y %H:%M")`*
